channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Near bus stop BU Bromley Common towards Bromley, there is an entrance to wooded area, sort of behind bench, more fly tipping, only reported similar 2 weeks ago, 6th March
item.description:
Other litter Lat/Long - 51.3897183, 0.0346582 what3words - shady.spices.ideal Nearest address - Boswell House, 1 Crown Lane, Bromley, BR2 9TH
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155, Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress Camberwell Church Street, 6th March
item.description:
Day 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another Forest user obstructing the paving Vicarage Grove, 6th March
item.description:
Year 2 of reporting this particular issue. Well done Forest. Who needs people using pavements?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 6th March
item.description:
Wood dumped on grass verge behind 54A Birch Row

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Row, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches falling, 6th March
item.description:
I reported this tree previously as a large branch came down on my car. Which Bromley would not pay out. It was cut back last year but went out yesterday and another large branch has come down. Last time I watched a branch come down just after someone walked past. I want something done with the tree or removed as am worried my car will get damaged again and I will take it further or someone will get hurt.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling waste not collected since 20/02/2026, 6th March
item.description:
Bins not collected for the past 2 weeks.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bassant Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: William Dunbar House parking, 6th March
item.description:
The front gate has been hit by a heavy vehicle and is now broken.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albert Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More furniture dumped overnight, 6th March
item.description:
This sofa was dumped last night. Either every flat in the area now has a new sofa, or someone is collecting unwanted furniture and dumping it here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-70, Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Star of David graffiti, 6th March
item.description:
Needs to be removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Denver Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green box, 6th March
item.description:
Please remove graffiti on the green box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramley Place, Barnes Cray, Greater London

item.title: Dumped Garden gate, 6th March
item.description:
A resident has dumped a garden gate and it has been lent up against someone else's garden wall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartslock Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, reported many months ago., 6th March
item.description:
Hi I reported this many months ago and it's still there. It's on the grooved dropped curb opposite Woodman House, at the junction of Westwood Lane and Lyndon Avenue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-24, Lyndon Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole road needs attentions, 6th March
item.description:
Northdown road has several speed humps and the road is becoming damaged in several places , there are also alot of potholes, a request for the road to be surveyed please as it is in a state of disrepair and needs urgent attention, only the top part of this road was resurfaced but this was a while ago. This is from upper wickham lane onwards.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northdown Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot gole in road, 6th March
item.description:
Pot hole on white line. Also sunken iron service near whitw line. When vehicle hits them they cause a very loud noise. Damage is located between 116 and 118 kent house road The road itself is a patch work quilt of repairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road needs sweeping, 6th March
item.description:
Stephenson Road outside the station where there is a bollard has not been swept for a long time and full of cigarette buts and general rubbish, this looks unsightlt and needs urgent attention, the sweeper machine will not do the job needs Manuel .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous road surface with large pot holes!!!, 6th March
item.description:
Dangerous road surface with large pot holes!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123, Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collection of waste not timely causing unsightly litter, 6th March
item.description:
The recycling waste bin for cardboard and plastic was not openable. Boxes were being left on toland around. Please could council empty it and clear the excess flowing around at the earliest? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post 208F8 on the path between Whitehall recreation ground and Southborough Lane, 6th March
item.description:
Not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustine's Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe Road N16, 6th March
item.description:
Linthorpe Road Hackney N16 needs cleaning from top to bottom, pavements and around trees bases.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint tins and black sacks dumped, 6th March
item.description:
As title and black sacks ripped so waste spilling out. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
